CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, token String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Hello World', 'hello,world');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('OpenAI is great!', 'openai');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM test_strings WHERE token = 'OPENAI';
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('C++ is a programming language.', 'c++');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM test_strings WHERE token = 'C++';
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('123 Main Street', '123');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, '123') AS result FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Full Stack Development', 'full');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, 'FULL') FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('   Spaces are tricky   ', 'spaces');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, 'SPACES') FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Various Symbols @#$', 'symbols');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM test_strings WHERE token = '@#$';
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, NULL) FROM test_strings;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, 'invalid token!') FROM test_strings;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM (SELECT haystack, 'hello' AS token FROM test_strings) AS subquery;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE token IN ('HELLO', 'WORLD');
CREATE TABLE additional_test (haystack String, token String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY haystack; INSERT INTO additional_test VALUES ('Test Case', 'test');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) FROM additional_test;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, '') AS result FROM test_strings;
SELECT DISTINCT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, 'Hello World') FROM test_strings;
